common.loadError: Could not load data. Please try again shortly.
common.connectionError: Unable to connect to the server. Please try again shortly.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: A supporting view for cash, holdings, and the next action to check.
dashboard.nextActionNoHoldings: Explore a stock and practice your first buy.
dashboard.nextActionHasHoldings: Review your holdings and decide what to do next.

trade.guidance: Buying uses cash to practice purchasing shares. Selling turns owned shares back into cash.
trade.quantityWholeNumber: Enter a whole number of shares.
trade.exceedsCash: This is above your available cash for buying.
trade.exceedsHolding: This is above the quantity you can sell.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.emptyBody: Save stocks you are curious about so you can check them quickly later.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.emptyBody: Your buys, sells, and exchanges will appear here.

analytics.title: Analysis
analytics.subtitle: Reference information for understanding your game result. Start with return, diversification, and cash share.
analytics.summaryNoData: There are no holdings yet, so there is not much to analyze. Find a stock and practice your first trade.
analytics.summaryLimited: There is not enough trading history yet for deeper analysis. More activity will make the trend clearer.
analytics.summaryConcentrated: Your results are visible, but a few holdings may carry a large share. A concentrated position can make game results swing more.
analytics.summaryBalanced: Check return and diversification together. Cash share can also help you understand your next choice.
analytics.simulationNote: This analysis is reference information for understanding your game result.
analytics.allocationOverTimeHint: Each point splits your total portfolio between stock holdings and cash (including FX cash).
analytics.chartEmpty: Your performance chart will appear after more trading activity.
analytics.returnInsightPositive: Your value is above the starting balance. Results can still move around.
analytics.returnInsightNegative: Your value is below the starting balance. Check which holdings moved most.
analytics.returnInsightFlat: There is not much movement yet. More activity will reveal the trend.
analytics.concentrationHigh: One position has a high share, so results can swing more.
analytics.concentrationBalanced: Your holdings are spread across positions more evenly.
analytics.concentrationEmpty: Diversification will appear once you own stocks.
analytics.cashHigh: Keeping cash gives you room for the next opportunity.
analytics.cashLow: Your cash share is low, so there is less room for new buys.
analytics.cashBalanced: Cash and stock exposure are both present in your portfolio.
analytics.activityLow: There is not enough trading history yet for deeper analysis.
analytics.activityActive: Your trading history is growing enough to review patterns.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters
auth.coldStartHint: Waking up the server… the free-tier backend can take up to a minute on the first request.
auth.demoHint: Demo account — username: demo · password: demo1234

game.title: Current Game
game.subtitle: Track the active game period, return, and benchmark comparison here.
game.noActiveDesc: Create a new game from the game hub
game.notPlayableDesc: Open an active game or create a new one from My Games.
game.makeTradesPrompt: Make some trades to compare your performance
game.day1Desc: Start trading to track your progress here

games.title: My Games
games.emptyBody: Start a new game to practice virtual investing.
games.singleGameNote: You can run multiple independent games.
games.restartWarning: A new game is created separately from existing game history.
games.setupComingSoon: Set a game name, duration, and starting cash before starting.
games.startConfirmBody: A new game runs separately from existing game history.
games.selectBody: Continue an active game or create a new one to practice another strategy.
games.setupValidation: Starting cash and duration must be greater than 0.
games.titleTooLong: Game name must be 80 characters or fewer.
games.notFoundBody: This game was removed or is not available to your account.

portfolio.emptyBody: Find a stock you are interested in and practice your first buy.
